ground_truth.title: Machine Reviews
ground_truth.author: Joe Gray
ground_truth.main_content:
Looking for the best Machines for your garage gym? Below are all of the Machine Reviews I have done with items I have handled myself.

In a home or garage gym, you often can’t own a full line of commercial machines. So you make compromises and put together a few pieces that do fit. You might be able to fit more if the pieces fold away, store away, or otherwise breakdown. But your best bet is likely to snag a machine that does a lot. We just don’t want a jack of all trades, master of none situation. So picking the right machine is crucial. 

One of the best places to grab home gym machines is from Strength Warehouse USA. They have offerings from a ton of companies.

Ultimately your choice to include a machine in your gym will be based on your needs, goals, budget, and space.

Machine Reviews

1. Gentleman Fitness Compact Belt Squat Review - 2025
   The Gentleman Fitness Compact Belt Squat passes TWO out of the THREE tests of what I need out of a quality belt squat.

2. Freak Athlete Hyper Pro Review - The BEST Got Better - 2025
   The Freak Athlete Hyper Pro is our current reigning champ for the BEST Nordic Machine for Home Gyms, and the one we are keeping in our gym. But it might not be the best fit for everyone.

3. BootySprout Pro Review - The BEST Hip Thrust Machine For Your Home Gym in 2025
   Hip Thrusts are awesome, but they are a pain to set up. The BootySprout Pro aims to fix this for the serious home gym lifter.

4. Shogun FLEX Review - Power Packed and Portable - 2025
   I am impressed by how well the Shogun FLEX and the full line of accessories work. But the price and limited resistance profile might be a deal breaker for some.

5. Exxentric kBox V5 Review - The BEST Flywheel Device For Your Home Gym?
   The Exxentric kBox V5 Active Platform is a premium option with very few small nitpicky flaws. The key decision isn't should you buy from Exxentric, but should you own a Flywheel at all?

6. The Tib Bar Guy Nordic Back Extension Machine V2 - 2025 Review
   The Tib Bar Guy Nordic Back Extension Machine V2 is cheaper than most of its competition and offers more exercise options than most of them as well. But there are some quality control issues that have me concerned for the longevity of the product.

7. Shogun NORD-EX Review 2025 - The BEST Nordic Combo for a home gym?
   The Shogun NORD-EX has a lot of premium features and is by far the most aesthetically pleasing option on the market. For some people this will be perfect, but it isn't MY favorite option.

8. BaseBlocks The Nordic Plus - A Terrible Choice in 2025
   The BaseBlocks The Nordic Plus is the lowest cost option for a combo Nordic and Back Extension. But that is where the good things end for this. My recommendation is to save a few bucks and buy one of the other models available from another company.

9. Inspire FT2 Review - Still Worth It In 2025?
   The Inspire FT2 has been a legend in the home gym equipment game for decades. It still is the only option on the market that does as much as it does, this well. But it is getting more and more difficult to recommend it.

10. The BEST Freak Athlete Nordic Hyper GHD Review - 2024
    The review you've been waiting for. Over 2 months of use, the pros, cons, ups and downs... everything for the Freak Athlete Nordic Hyper GHD.

11. Syedee Hip Thrust Machine - Budget Friendly But Is It Any Good? 2025 Review
    Could a more "dedicated" hip thrust solution be better than our favorite Booty Sprout? The Syedee Hip Thrust Machine has entered the chat.

12. Powertec Workbench Levergym - The BEST Complete Guide - 2025
    I've owned and used the Powertec Workbench Levergym in my garage gym since 2017. Here, after literal thousands of reps, sets, and workouts... hours of contemplating, experimenting, researching, and building... is my comprehensive guide for the Powertec Workbench Levergym.

13. Hoist HF-4263 Ab/Back Hyper Bench Review
    The Hoist HF-4263 is good, but not quite great. It does what I need it to, but not exactly all I WANT it to.

14. BootySprout Review - MUCH better than I thought - 2025
    What the heck is a powerlifting bodybuilder doing with a psuedo As Seen On TV butt blasting device like the Booty Sprout? Great question!

15. Powertec Levergym 1+ Year Review
    My gym radically changed when I added the Powertec Levergym. SO much functionality in such a compact space, for a fantastic price. And if you are creative, it is a near endless list of options.

16. Get RxD Linear Bearing GHD: Glute Ham Developer Review
    The Get RxD Linear Bearing GHD is a solid offering. It is probably the minimum I would require for a GHD in your garage.
with: Looking for the best Machines for your garage gym? Below are all of the Machine Reviews I have done with items I have handled myself.
In a home or garage gym, you often can’t own a full line of commercial machines. So you make compromises and put together a few pieces that do fit.
Ultimately your choice to include a machine in your gym will be based on your needs, goals, budget, and space.
